case_title: JAPB ASSOCIATES, A CALIFORNIA CORP. VS MENDEZ, KEVIN D.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY JAPB ASSOCIATES, A CALIFORNIA CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT MENDEZ, KEVIN D. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-20-1990 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 02

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JAPB ASSOCIATES, A CALIFORNIA CORP. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MENDEZ, KEVIN D. $2,848.91 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,888.91 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
THIS CLAIM WAS ACTUALLY FILED AT NORTH ORANGE COUNTY MUNICIPAL COURT. JUDGMENT ENTERED ON 1/13/97.
